title: Fabricia
description:
A Vanilla modpack aimed at creating a lively environment, useful mechanics, and performance mods specifically tailored for Mulltiplayer and social gameplay.

Previously known as Fabricstarter
body:
# Finally, a cozy modpack for servers 💤😴

The search is over; finally, a modpack made for everything: optimization, customizability, and so much more without taking away from the Vanilla-SMP experience! 
This modpack aims at making it feel like your own, customizable client with more features than you might think! Change resource packs on the fly, invite friends to your server when they come online, sit back with a controller, and more!

### What is Fabricia? 💭

A Vanilla modpack tailored for a social, multiplayer, vanilla experience for any server you may frequently play on, or even just on singleplayer!

Tired of having to make those optimization packs feel a little bit more accessible for your playstyle? Why not have full customizability to your client with Fabricia? Adding all the best Fabric mods on Modrinth to make your gameplay easier, better, and feel like its your own in an intuitive and efficient way.

### Why Fabricia?? 🤔

Fabricia aims at combining a mix of client-side modpacks all together to bring a cozier, customizable experience that many modpacks lack. I'm also very welcome to any and all suggestions for the modpack. I often find myself downloading tons of mods myself after downloading optimizations packs and have created this after many years of struggle and learning so that everytime Minecraft has an update, I have everything ready for my pleasure, no matter the version, no matter the modloader.

### If you like this modpack make sure to like to be updated on future updates! ❤️

<details>
<summary>Current Features in v3.9(February 2026)</summary>

> ## Customizability
> > Add resource packs to make the game feel better easily with Resourcify, get cosmetics with Essential's wardrobe (free stuff every major update), easy control binding, and more with every update!
> ## QOL
> > Better F3, Blurry GUI, Chat Heads, Dynamic Lights, Enhanced Attack Indicator, InvMove, Inventory Sorting, MouseTweaks, Sodium, EMI
> ## Optimization
> > With Sodium, LazyDFU, chunk management mods, and some others, your game will be running smooth like butter! Faster load times, less lag, and a number of useful mods all without ruining memory usage, CPU usage, and having mod-bloat.
> ## Essential Mod
> > The Essential mod allows you to do lots of things like: Adding friends, editing and sharing screenshots, messaging friends and making group chats, inviting friends to servers, has lots of cosmetics that are paid with free, seasonal, cosmetics for you and new ones with every update!

</details>

<details>
<summary>Future Plans</summary>

> ## **Near Future Plans**
> > 1. Adding lost mods in past versions
> >     - Autofishing, autoplanting, etc* (May be added to seperate version download(s) due to servers considering them to be cheating
> >     - Scoreboard fixes/customizability?*
> >     - Command macros
> >     - Continue Button / FastQuit
> > 2. Adding ways to make singleplayer feel less 'lonely'*
> >     - Adding a global chat like MineTogether?*
> >     - Adding LFG to Discord*
> > 3. Discord Rich Presence connection as well as maybe a Discord accessibility in-game?*

> ## **Bigger Future Plans**
> > 1. Adding ViaFabric to be able to join older/newer servers
> >      - Wanting to make this modpack an all-in-one modpack so you don't need to close the client for another, skin, account and more utilities therefore I will add ViaFabric stuff for previous versions, newer versions, etc for any accesibility on any server!
> > 2. Adding a custom Main Menu themed for Fabricia or a custom, cozy Resource Pack
> > 3. Adding an in-game account switcher for alt accounts✓(works on Essential)

✓ *= Newly Featured*

**subject to change*
*(Last Updated: 20/2/2026 v3.9)*

</details>

## Frequently Asked Questions (FAQ)

<details>
<summary>👀 Are there any game-changing mods like Create, Ad Astra, or anything like that? </summary>
No, the mods used are client-side mods aimed at amplifying your Vanilla Minecraft experience so that you can feel in control of your Minecraft client with a bunch of useful tools without leaving your favourite minecraft servers/worlds behind! However, you *can* use the pack to play singleplayer worlds and easily add data packs to use a plethora of new mods posted on Modrinth with Resourcify if you still want that sort of thing!
</details>

<details>
<summary>🤨 What even *is* this? </summary>
Fabricia is an optimization/customization modpack with a bunch of nifty quality-of-life features for either multiplayer or singleplayer gameplay. A lot of them being customizable. Make it your own version and show it off!
</details>

<details>
<summary>💽 Does this modpack have a server? </summary>
No, I don't plan on hosting a server or making a server pack right now and if I had a server for my modpacks, I would add it to the servers.dat file into the .mrpack and advertise it on their respected modpack pages. However, I have a Discord server to find groups to play with if you'd like that; you can use Essential to play together!
</details>

<details>
<summary>🔮 Do you plan on updating this modpack for future updates? (1.22, etc) </summary>
Yes! Absolutely, I've done this for a long time, I plan on sticking out with this one until I'm fully burnt out. I also try to update to the most popular versions but will HAPPILY make a specific version for you and others as long as it is between the versions 1.16 - 1.21 and beyond
</details>

<details>
<summary>☹️ Why do my settings get reverted with every new update? </summary>
Sometimes if you reinstall the modpack for the update, it'll use the options.txt file that I supply the exported mrpack for Modrinth, I upload this in the pack to stop the Narrator jumpscare everytime someone loads the modpack and gets the UI out of your face starting at 4 and some other useful things I use that you may change or grow to like! If you would like to stop this, I suggest just adding your own settings, then using your own options.txt and saving it for future updates :}
</details>

## Have any more questions ❓

Add me on Essential, my Minecraft username is ForeTwenty. fittingly, and I'll get back to your message when I'm online! Otherwise, I plan to make a Github repo soon to publish known issues, gather feedback, and add contributors.

![a landscape of a tower on an island in a lake surrounded by acacia and oak trees](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/si0JWNGV/images/fa2749284ef6290ba75abe33a442dcfa39d83db6.png)

<details>
<summary>Disclaimer</summary>

I would like to note that none of the mods that I put into my modpacks are mine, the mods I add to my modpacks are all open to browse and support and I'm proud to support them but if I make my own mods for this modpack, I will then note about it. Nothing else in this modpack is mine other than screenshots and art. All profits from this modpack go back to the mod owners in donations directly through Modrinth. I do not profit off of this and will not be in the future. If my mind changes, it will be in bold text.

Along with this, not every update will be exactly the same. Some mods may go abandoned after some time, some versions just go weird with mods, and I always make this modpack tailored towards my own playstyle, maybe we have similar styles.

</details>
